sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100853" key="sunomotage/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνομοτᾰγέω</orth>, <sense id="n100853.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">correspond</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ταῖς θηλείαις ὑγιεινὴν -εῖν τὴν παρθενίαν</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">is correspondingly</tr_> healthy for females, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
